checked_sources.source_name: Binance USD-M Futures REST API docs
checked_sources.result: current REST order book exists, but it is a live/current snapshot endpoint, not historical backfill

checked_sources.source_name: Binance USD-M Futures bookTicker REST docs
checked_sources.result: current best bid/ask snapshot exists, but no historical REST range parameter is documented
README documents futures aggTrades, klines, and trades. It does not prove full 2023-2025 USD-M order book/depth/bookTicker coverage for the target universe.

checked_sources.source_name: Binance Data Collection bookTicker listing/search evidence
checked_sources.result: A monthly bookTicker archive family is visible in public metadata/search results for some symbols, but evidence indicates it is partial and not current through 2025-10-31.
OKX advertises high-resolution L2 order book data from March 2023 onward, which is useful but starts after the target 2023-01-01 date.

checked_sources.source_name: OKX V5 market data API docs
checked_sources.result: current REST and WebSocket order book channels exist; they do not establish full historical backfill.
Third-party providers may expose order book data, but discovered examples require API keys, vendor access, or start too late for the 2023-01-01 target.

existing_local_repo_artifacts.review_result: no existing tracked order book/depth/bookTicker availability lock or reviewed data layer found

binance_availability.availability_summary: Current public REST and WebSocket order book/bookTicker data exists. Public archive evidence for USD-M bookTicker/depth is partial and does not prove complete 2023-01-01 through 2025-10-31 coverage across the 81-symbol overlap universe.

historical_depth_snapshots.available_window: not proven from public/no-key Binance sources
historical_depth_snapshots.granularity: current REST snapshot only for /fapi/v1/depth; WebSocket can collect forward
historical_depth_snapshots.evidence: Official REST order book endpoint returns the current symbol order book without historical date range parameters.

bookTicker_history.available_window: partial public monthly archive evidence, reportedly around 2023-05 through 2024-03 for BTCUSDT
bookTicker_history.granularity: best bid/ask update records when archived; current REST snapshot otherwise
bookTicker_history.symbol_coverage_estimate: not proven for 81 symbols and not full 2025 window
bookTicker_history.evidence: BookTicker public archive search/listing evidence is partial; REST bookTicker is current snapshot only.

bid_ask_spread_history.available_window: derived only where bookTicker or order book history exists
bid_ask_spread_history.granularity: top-of-book spread derivable from bid/ask snapshots
bid_ask_spread_history.evidence: Spread is derived from bid/ask; no complete historical bid/ask source was proven.

best_bid_ask_snapshots.available_window: current REST or partial historical bookTicker only
best_bid_ask_snapshots.granularity: millisecond timestamps in current responses; historical archive not full
best_bid_ask_snapshots.evidence: Official bookTicker endpoint documents current best bid/ask price and quantity.

public_rest_limitations: REST /fapi/v1/depth is a current snapshot endpoint.
REST /fapi/v1/ticker/bookTicker is current best bid/ask for one or all symbols.
Neither REST endpoint provides historical startTime/endTime range backfill for order book states.

archive_families_found_or_indicated: monthly bookTicker for some USD-M symbols
notes: Official public-data README does not prove futures order book/depth/bookTicker full coverage.
Public search/listing evidence indicates bookTicker history is partial and not current through 2025-10-31.
No bulk archive enumeration or data download was performed.

okx_availability.availability_summary: OKX publishes an official historical market-data page advertising high-resolution L2 order book data from March 2023 onward. This is partial for the requested 2023-01-01 start and does not by itself prove complete 81-symbol overlap coverage for the full target window.

historical_order_book_depth.symbol_coverage_estimate: unknown for all 81 overlap symbols without bulk listing
historical_order_book_depth.evidence: OKX historical data page advertises high-resolution L2 data from March 2023 onward.

best_bid_ask_history.granularity: derivable from L2 where L2 exists; current ticker/order book APIs are live/current

public_rest_order_book.granularity: REST order book current snapshot; full order book current snapshot

public_archive.available_window: March 2023 onward per OKX historical-data page
public_archive.reason_full_window_false: The requested window begins on 2023-01-01, before the advertised OKX order book start.

rest_websocket_limitations: REST order book endpoints are current snapshots, not historical range queries.
Public WebSocket channels are live/forward data streams.
Tick-by-tick deeper channels may require login/VIP level for some OKX channels, so they are not treated as public/no-key acquisition-ready.

third_party_public_no_key_availability.availability_summary: No clearly free public/no-key third-party source was verified to cover Binance and OKX order book history for all 81 overlap symbols from 2023-01-01 through 2025-10-31.

sources_reviewed.reason: Docs/examples require an API key and OKX order book dataset page starts in 2025, not 2023.
Vendor-grade historical order book data is documented, but it is not treated as public/free/no-key for this route.
Found live/recent collectors, limited-symbol datasets, or unrelated venue datasets, not full Binance/OKX 81-symbol history.

continuation_decision.reason: Full-window public/no-key order book/depth/bookTicker coverage for the 81-symbol Binance/OKX overlap universe is not proven. Data direction remains pending.

limitations: No bulk order book data was downloaded or enumerated.
Public archive listing probes and documentation checks cannot prove missing files for every symbol without bulk enumeration.
OKX official historical L2 availability begins after the requested 2023-01-01 start.
Binance public/no-key historical bookTicker/depth coverage is partial or unproven for the full 2023-2025 target window.
Paid/vendor/API-key sources are excluded by the task constraints.
